title: Strategic Narratives in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger strategic narratives in practice judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Strategic Narratives in Practice is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Strategic Narratives in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good strategic narratives in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Strategic Narratives in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
